message:
fix: crash config borrow, idiomatic error handling, health check logic fix

crash.rs:
- Change install_panic_hook() to take &CrashConfig (borrow) instead of
  consuming the config by value
- Replace verbose map_err(|e| io::Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, e))
  with idiomatic std::io::Error::other() (stabilized in Rust 1.74)
- Add #[must_use] to list_crash_bundles() and latest_crash_bundle()
- Use let-else pattern for fs::read_dir fallible return
- Replace filter_map(|e| e.ok()) with filter_map(Result::ok)
- Replace map_or(false, ...) with is_ok_and(...)

events.rs:
- Simplify suppressed_count() from .map().unwrap_or() to .map_or()

output/renderers.rs:
- Fix inverted boolean logic in HealthSnapshotRenderer: the db_writable
  check was displaying "writable" when db_writable was false and
  "NOT writable" when true — swap the branches to match semantics

.gitignore:
- Add .wa/ directory (local runtime/config)

Also sync beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,5 +54,8 @@ doc/
 # E2E test artifacts (runtime)
 e2e-artifacts/
 
+# Local wa runtime/config
+.wa/
+
 # Fuzzing artifacts
 fuzz/artifacts/
